summary: The five Public MCP configs expose identical spec_kit_memory env blocks with the same note text, key order, and a single live setting: EMBEDDINGS_PROVIDER=auto.
Runtime defaults match the packet claims: Voyage uses rerank-2.5, embedding dimensions remain provider-driven, and undefined rollout flags default to enabled.
Both workspaces typecheck cleanly and the targeted Vitest suites pass after the review fixes.
evidence: node mcp_server/node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run mcp_server/tests/tool-input-schema.vitest.ts mcp_server/tests/graph-metadata-schema.vitest.ts mcp_server/tests/graph-metadata-integration.vitest.ts mcp_server/tests/cross-encoder.vitest.ts mcp_server/tests/cross-encoder-extended.vitest.ts mcp_server/tests/rollout-policy.vitest.ts mcp_server/tests/feature-flag-reference-docs.vitest.ts --config mcp_server/vitest.config.ts

summary: Phase 012 packet completeness had regressed: the packet was missing Level 2 support docs and root graph metadata, which caused strict validation to fail before the review remediation.
resolution: Restored the missing Level 2 packet files, normalized packet headers and anchors, regenerated root graph metadata, and re-ran strict validation to green.
